label: 1646 CE
era_summary: 1646 (MDCXLVI) was a common year starting on Monday of the Gregorian calendar and a common year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar, the 1646th year of the Common Era (CE) and Anno Domini (AD) designations, the 646th year of the 2nd millennium, the 46th year of the 17th century, and the 7th year of the 1640s decade. As of the start of 1646, the Gregorian calendar was 10 days ahead of the Julian calendar, which remained in localized use until 1923.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1646: Turkey-Venice (assisted by France, German states) (Crete), 1645-69; Spain (Sicily), 1646-47. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1646: Spain-United Provinces, 1621-48; Sweden, Saxe-Weimar, Hesse-Cassel, Brunswick, Saxony, emperor, Spain, 1630-48; France, Savoy, Parma-Spain, emperor, Bavaria, Brandenburg, Saxony, 1635-48. Maddison records GDP/capita 1511 (PRT, 1646) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
